name: map-downloader
description: Tokyo area map tiles downloader for disaster evacuation guide

scripts.download:all: npm run build && node dist/index.js download-all --area tokyo_all
scripts.download:all-23ku: npm run build && node dist/index.js download-all --area tokyo_23ku
scripts.download:all-tama: npm run build && node dist/index.js download-all --area tokyo_tama
scripts.quick-start: npm run build && node dist/index.js quick-start
scripts.info: npm run build && node dist/index.js info
